title: Celtic tracking Austrian goalkeeper - gossip
summary: Celtic is monitoring an Austrian goalkeeper who has drawn comparisons to Manuel Neuer. The club is also targeting midfielder Benjamin Nygren as a potential signing this summer.
content: Celtic join the list of clubs keeping tabs on an Austrian goalkeeper compared to Manuel Neuer, while midfielder Benjamin Nygren is a target for a move this summer.

zh.title: 凯尔特人追踪奥地利门将 - 传闻
zh.summary: 凯尔特人正在关注一位奥地利门将，他被拿来与曼努埃尔·诺伊尔相比较。该俱乐部还瞄准在今年夏天签下中场球员本杰明·尼格伦。

title: Hume reflects on 'whirlwind' rise after award win
summary: Trai Hume has reflected on his rapid career progression, describing it as a "whirlwind." The Sunderland and Northern Ireland player has established himself as a key figure for both club and country following a recent award win.
content: Trai Hume says he has enjoyed a "whirlwind" rise in football after establishing himself for Sunderland and Northern Ireland.

zh.title: 休姆在获奖后反思职业生涯的"旋风式"上升
zh.summary: 特拉伊·休姆反思了他的快速职业发展，称其为"旋风式"上升。这位桑德兰和北爱尔兰球员在最近获得奖项后，已经成为俱乐部和国家队的关键人物。

title: Can stats pick out the Championship play-off winner?
summary: BBC Sport's analysis team examines whether statistical analysis can predict the winner of the Championship play-offs. The investigation explores what data-driven insights might reveal about playoff outcomes.
content: BBC Sport's Ask Me Anything team looks to see if statistics can help us to pick out the winner of the Championship play-offs.

zh.title: 统计数据能预测英冠附加赛冠军吗？
zh.summary: BBC体育分析团队研究统计分析是否能预测英冠附加赛的冠军。该调查探讨了数据驱动的见解可能对附加赛结果的启示。

title: Adriano, Samba, R.Larcos - ranking the most iconic video game footballers
summary: The article ranks the most iconic football players featured in popular video games including FIFA, Pro Evolution Soccer, and Football Manager. These games have become cultural touchstones for football fans worldwide.
content: Fifa, Pro Evolution Soccer and Football Manager have been among the most popular football video games - but who are the most iconic players from them?

zh.title: Adriano、Samba、R.Larcos——评选最具标志性的电子游戏足球运动员
zh.summary: 该文章评选了在FIFA、实况足球和足球经理等热门电子游戏中登场的最具标志性的足球运动员。这些游戏已成为全球足球迷的文化标志。

title: NWSL Power Rankings: Portland Thorns take top spot...
summary: After six matchdays, the Portland Thorns lead ESPN's NWSL Power Rankings following back-to-back victories. The Washington Spirit remain close behind after a strong stretch of form.
content: After 6 matchdays, we have a new No. 1 as the Portland Thorns took two wins in a week to lead ESPN's NWSL Power Rankings, though the Washington Spirit are hot on their heels.

zh.title: 美国职业女子足球联赛能力排名：波特兰荆棘队占据榜首
zh.summary: 经过六轮比赛，波特兰荆棘队在连胜后领先ESPN的美国职业女子足球联赛能力排名。华盛顿精神队在出色表现后紧随其后。

title: Pep: Premier League out of City's hands after draw...
summary: Manchester City's dramatic 3-3 draw at Everton leaves Pep Guardiola's side facing an uphill battle in the Premier League title race. City has handed control of the championship to Arsenal with their second-half collapse.
content: Manchester City coach Pep Guardiola praised the determination of his team after it snatched a dramatic 3-3 draw at Everton, but he knows his squad faces an uphill battle in the Premier League title race.

zh.title: 瓜迪奥拉：平局后英超已不在曼城手中
zh.summary: 曼城在埃弗顿的戏剧性3:3平局让瓜迪奥拉的球队在英超争冠战中面临艰难局面。曼城下半场的崩盘让他们将英超控制权拱手让给了阿森纳。

title: Santos opens probe of alleged assault by Neymar
summary: Santos FC has launched an investigation into an alleged physical assault incident involving player Neymar during a training session on Sunday. The probe comes amid ongoing scrutiny of player conduct.
content: Santos have opened an investigation into the "alleged physical assault" of Robinho Junior by Neymar during Sunday's training session.

zh.title: 桑托斯对内马尔涉嫌袭击事件展开调查
zh.summary: 桑托斯足球俱乐部已对周日训练中涉及球员内马尔的涉嫌身体袭击事件展开调查。该调查是在对球员行为持续审视的背景下进行的。

title: 'Good news' for Arsenal as Ødegaard, Havertz fit
summary: Arsenal manager Mikel Arteta confirmed that captain Martin Odegaard and forward Kai Havertz are available to play in the crucial UEFA Champions League semi-final second leg against Atlético Madrid on Tuesday. Both players' fitness is critical for the club's European ambitions.
content: Arsenal coach Mikel Arteta has confirmed that captain Martin Ødegaard and forward Kai Havertz are both available to play Atlético Madrid in their crunch UEFA Champions League semi final second leg on Tuesday.

zh.title: 阿森纳的"好消息"：厄德高和哈弗茨状态良好
zh.summary: 阿森纳主教练米克尔·阿尔特塔确认队长马丁·厄德高和前锋凯·哈弗茨可以参加周二对阵马德里竞技的欧冠半决赛次回合比赛。这两名球员的状态对俱乐部欧洲赛事的目标至关重要。

title: Forest hand woeful Chelsea 6th straight PL loss
summary: Chelsea suffered their sixth consecutive Premier League defeat at home to Nottingham Forest. The run of losses has left the club facing serious questions about their season.
content: Chelsea fell to their sixth straight defeat in the Premier League at home to Nottingham Forest.

zh.title: 森林队给切尔西制造英超第六场连败
zh.summary: 切尔西在主场对阵诺丁汉森林的比赛中遭遇第六场英超连败。这一连串失利使俱乐部面临关于本赛季的严肃质疑。

title: Alexis Sanchez lifts Sevilla out of LaLiga drop zo...
summary: Alexis Sánchez's second-half goal secured a 1-0 victory for Sevilla over Real Sociedad. The win lifts the club out of La Liga's relegation zone with crucial points in the fight for survival.
content: A second half goal from Alexis Sánchez lifted Sevilla over Real Sociedad 1-0 and out of La Liga's relegation zone on Monday.

zh.title: 桑切斯助塞维利亚脱离西甲降级区
zh.summary: 桑切斯在下半场的进球为塞维利亚主场1-0击败皇家社会，这场胜利帮助球队脱离西甲降级区，在保级争夺中获得关键分数。

title: Adams touts Bournemouth 'belief' in Europe spot
summary: Bournemouth midfielder Tyler Adams expressed the squad's confidence and determination to secure a European spot. Adams emphasized the team's need to stay composed to seal its maiden European campaign.
content: Midfielder Tyler Adams said there is belief and ambition among Bournemouth's squad as the club close in on a maiden European campaign and added the team needs to stay "calm and collected" to seal its place.

zh.title: 亚当斯对伯恩茅斯欧洲资格充满信心
zh.summary: 伯恩茅斯中场球员泰勒·亚当斯表达了球队对确保欧洲名额的信心和决心。亚当斯强调球队需要保持冷静，以确保其首个欧洲赛事参赛权。

title: Promoted Coventry sing sign the deal to Lampard
summary: Frank Lampard was serenaded with chants from approximately 50,000 Coventry City supporters during a Premier League promotion celebration at War Memorial Park. The scene underscores the manager's popularity as the club aims to finalize his contract.
content: Frank Lampard was serenaded with chants of "sign the contract" as an estimated 50,000 Coventry City supporters flocked to War Memorial Park to celebrate their long-awaited return to the Premier League.

zh.title: 升级的考文垂与兰帕德敲定协议
zh.summary: 弗兰克·兰帕德在战争纪念公园的英超升级庆祝活动中，受到约50,000名考文垂城球迷的欢呼。这一幕充分体现了这位主帅的受欢迎程度，球队正在努力敲定他的合同。

title: Griezmann confident Atlético can make history
summary: Antoine Griezmann expressed his readiness to "make history" with Atlético Madrid. The forward is focused on leading his team past Arsenal in the Champions League semi-final to reach the final.
content: Antoine Griezmann said he's ready to "make history" with Atlético Madrid, as they prepare to face Arsenal for a place in the Champions League final.

zh.title: 格里兹曼表示马竞可以创造历史
zh.summary: 安托万·格里兹曼表达了他与马德里竞技队"创造历史"的准备。这位前锋专注于在欧冠半决赛中带领球队战胜阿森纳进入决赛。

title: The night Man City lost the title? Chaotic draw wi...
summary: Manchester City's dramatic second-half collapse against Everton left the door wide open for Arsenal in the Premier League title race. The 3-3 draw handed control of the championship to their rivals.
content: Manchester City handed control of the Premier League title race to Arsenal with their dramatic second-half collapse on Merseyside.

zh.title: 曼城失去英超冠军的夜晚？混乱的平手
zh.summary: 曼城在下半场对埃弗顿的戏剧性崩溃，为阿森纳在英超争冠中打开了大门。3:3平局让冠军的控制权交给了他们的竞争对手。
